text:
VALUES: 0 = Did not screen positive for food need 
1 = Screened positive for food need 
Missing 

COMMENT: Variable considers the two HRSN food screening questions: SR_CORE_FOOD_1_CD and 
SR_CORE_FOOD_2_CD. This field is “1” if either of the two questions had a value of 1 = Sometimes 
True or 2 = Often True (positive for need). 

Variables that start with “SR” include information for each screening.
